---
title: "final-project"
output: html_document
---

## **Loading the Data**

```{r}
library("tidyverse")
```

---

```{r}
job_salaries <- read_delim("Data/job-salaries.csv", delim = ",")
llm_data <- read_delim("Data/large-language-models.csv", delim = ",")
```
---

## **Inspecting Dimensions and Variables**

```{r}
dim(job_salaries)
dim(llm_data)
```
---

```{r}
names(job_salaries)
names(llm_data)
```

```{r}
job_salaries %>% sample_n(5)
llm_data %>% sample_n(5)
```

## **Cleaning Year Columns**

```{r}
job_salaries <- job_salaries %>%
  mutate(work_year = as.numeric(work_year))
```

```{r}
llm_data <- llm_data %>%
  mutate(
    yy = substr(`Release Date`, 1, 2),
    year = as.numeric(paste0("20", yy))
  )
```

## **Checking Year Ranges**

```{r}
job_salaries %>%
  summarize(
    min_year = min(work_year, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_year = max(work_year, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

llm_data %>%
  summarize(
    min_year = min(year, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_year = max(year, na.rm = TRUE),
    missing_year = sum(is.na(year))
  )
```

## **Filtering the Data**

```{r}
job_filtered <- job_salaries %>%
  filter(work_year >= 2020, work_year <= 2025)

llm_filtered <- llm_data %>%
  filter(year >= 2018, year <= 2024)
```

---

```{r}
job_filtered %>% count(work_year)

llm_filtered %>% count(year)
```

---
## **Results** 

### **LLM Releases by Year**

```{r}
llm_filtered %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(n = n()) %>%
  ggplot(aes(year, n)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(x = "Year", y = "Number of LLM Releases")
```

---

### **Average AI Job Salaries**

```{r}
job_filtered %>%
  group_by(work_year) %>%
  summarize(mean_salary = mean(salary_in_usd, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(work_year, mean_salary)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(x = "Work Year", y = "Average Salary (USD)")
```

---

## **Counts of AI Related Job Roles**

```{r}
job_filtered %>%
  mutate(role = case_when(
    str_detect(job_title, "Machine Learning") ~ "ML",
    str_detect(job_title, "Data Scientist") ~ "DS",
    str_detect(job_title, "AI") ~ "AI",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )) %>%
  group_by(work_year, role) %>%
  summarize(n = n()) %>%
  ggplot(aes(work_year, n, col = role)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(x = "Work Year", y = "Count")
```

---

## **Combined Summary Table**

```{r}
job_filtered %>%
  group_by(work_year) %>%
  summarize(
    avg_salary = mean(salary_in_usd, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_jobs = n()
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    llm_filtered %>% group_by(year) %>% summarize(n_llms = n()),
    by = c("work_year" = "year")
  )
```
